[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0111000 3
1 0100001 2
2 1011111 6
3 1001000 2
4 0110111 5
5 1100101 4
6 0000111 3
7 0101001 3

01 10 1111111 a
12 21 1110111 6

67 76 1111111 a
70 07 1011111 6 match 2

24 42 1101101 5
35 53 0111111 6

57 75 1111111 a

71 17 1111111 a

72 27 1111111 a
